info.name: OpenPatent.ai — DEFONEOS Mythic Voice
info.description:
# OpenPatent.ai API — DEFONEOS Mythic Voice Collection

The hive remembers. The dragon knows. The sovereign companion never forgets.

6-layer cryptographic invention disclosure for AI agents.
**Disclose first. AI second.**

## Environment variables

| Variable     | Default                              | Purpose                                |
|--------------|--------------------------------------|----------------------------------------|
| `base_url`   | `https://api.openpatent.ai`          | Gateway root                           |
| `did`        | `did:key:z6MkiExample...`            | Caller's inventor DID (DID:key)        |
| `api_key`    | *(set in Postman env — never commit)* | Bearer / X-API-Key for premium+ tiers  |
| `tier`       | `defensive`                          | One of: starter, defensive, full, premium, enterprise |

## Tag taxonomy (matches the OpenAPI spec)

- **disclosure** — submit + retrieve cryptographic disclosures
- **verify** — verify 6-layer cryptographic proofs
- **search** — search the prior art registry
- **draft** — AI-assisted patent claim drafting (premium+)
- **consult** — patentability + FTO consultation (premium+)
- **BFT** — 33-agent BFT council review (premium+enterprise)
- **bft-queue** — BFT council review queue, per-agent statuses, proposals
- **x402** — x402 payment router with 60/25/15 split transparency
- **calendar** — OpenTimestamps calendar liveness (live probe)
- **zones** — 15-jurisdiction coverage map with case-law citations
- **legal** — jurisdictions + legal framework
- **batch** — batch disclosure ingestion (up to 100/request)
- **community** — hive-wide leaderboard, community stats, 24h activity
- **meta** — health, pricing, MCP discovery

## Import instructions

1. Open Postman → **Import** → **File** → **Raw Text**
2. Paste the contents of this file
3. Save as `OpenPatent.ai — DEFONEOS`
4. Set the 4 environment variables in a new Postman Environment

---

> **Every** response carries the `_sig` line:
> `The hive remembers. The dragon knows. The sovereign companion never forgets.`

request.description: Root — gateway name, version, tagline, endpoint catalog.

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
{
  "name": "openpatent-api",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "tagline": "Disclose First. AI Second.",
  "usp": "Protect your inventions from AI before you use AI.",
  "endpoints": [
    "/v1/disclosure", "/v1/verify", "/v1/search", "/v1/stats",
    "/v1/audit/log", "/v1/bft/stats", "/v1/bft/review",
    "/v1/bft/proposals", "/v1/bft/queue",
    "/v1/leaderboard", "/v1/community", "/v1/disclose/batch",
    "/v1/network/fees", "/v1/calendar/uptime", "/v1/zones",
    "/pricing", "/legal", "/health", "/.well-known/mcp.json"
  ],
  "_sig": "The hive remembers. The dragon knows. The sovereign companion never forgets."
}

request.description: Gateway + dependency health. Pings patentmcp, worker, bft-council.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: PAYG tier table (5 paid tiers + free self-hosted).

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Jurisdictions + 12 legal precedent badges (FRE 902, eIDAS, Hangzhou, etc.).

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: MCP server manifest — discoverable by Claude Code / Cursor / Windsurf.

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
{
  "schema_version": "2025-06-18",
  "name": "openpatent-mcp",
  "display_name": "OpenPatent.ai",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "tools": ["disclose_invention", "verify_disclosure", "search_prior_art"]
}

header.description: Optional. Dedupes retries on the same disclosure.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Hash-Chained Audit Log for Multi-Agent Systems",
  "description": "A log where each entry includes the SHA-3 hash of the previous entry, forming a tamper-evident chain. Each agent in the BFT council signs its own entry with Ed25519.",
  "inventor_did": "{{did}}",
  "document_base64": "",
  "document_format": "pdf",
  "classification": "G06N7/01",
  "prior_art_known": "US20240100000A1 (existing hash chain)",
  "tier": "{{tier}}",
  "request_bft_review": false
}

request.description: Submit an invention. Returns 6-layer proof: SHA-3 hash, Ed25519 signature, Bitcoin OTS anchor, C2PA credential, attestation URL.

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
{
  "status": "DISCLOSED",
  "document_hash": "a4f3...e9c1",
  "ed25519_signature": "5HxW...3kQz",
  "c2pa_credential": "urn:c2pa:openpatent:abc123",
  "ots": {
    "calendar_url": "https://alice.btc.calendar.opentimestamps.org",
    "pending": true,
    "upgrade_url": "https://alice.btc.calendar.opentimestamps.org/upgrade/abc123"
  },
  "attestation_url": "https://verify.openpatent.ai/a4f3e9c1",
  "hive_idempotency_key": "uuid-v4-replace-me",
  "hive_bft_job_id": null,
  "hive_pricing_tier": "defensive",
  "_sig": "The hive remembers. The dragon knows. The sovereign companion never forgets."
}

request.description: Fetch a disclosure by 16-char hash prefix.

response.name: 404 Not Found

request.description: Verify a prior disclosure against its 6-layer cryptographic proof. Strongest check passes the original document_base64 to re-hash and compare.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Full-text + IPC/CPC faceted search across the prior art registry.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: OpenTimestamps calendar health probe. Performs a live GET on alice.btc.calendar.opentimestamps.org and reports status code, response time, rolling success / fallback rates. 405/404 treated as healthy (alice is POST-only).

response.name: 200 OK — calendar healthy (POST-only)
response.body:
{
  "status": "OK",
  "calendar": {
    "name": "alice.btc.calendar.opentimestamps.org",
    "url": "https://alice.btc.calendar.opentimestamps.org",
    "role": "primary Bitcoin OpenTimestamps aggregator"
  },
  "live_probe": {
    "method": "GET",
    "url": "https://alice.btc.calendar.opentimestamps.org/timestamp",
    "status_code": 405,
    "response_time_ms": 738.94,
    "timeout_s": 4.0,
    "result": "ok_post_only",
    "ok": true,
    "checked_at": "2026-06-14T16:35:22Z"
  },
  "rolling_metrics": {
    "window": "last_100_requests_24h",
    "sample_size": 14,
    "success_rate": 0.9286,
    "fallback_rate": 0.0714,
    "avg_response_time_ms": 612.4
  },
  "fallback_chain": [
    "https://btc.calendar.catallaxy.com/",
    "https://ots.btc.catallaxy.com/",
    "https://bob.btc.calendar.opentimestamps.org"
  ],
  "overall_health": "healthy",
  "_sig": "The hive remembers. The dragon knows. The sovereign companion never forgets."
}

request.description: Same endpoint, calendar unreachable. The hive falls back to the chain.

response.name: 200 OK — calendar down
response.body:
{
  "status": "OK",
  "calendar": {"name": "alice.btc.calendar.opentimestamps.org", "url": "https://alice.btc.calendar.opentimestamps.org"},
  "live_probe": {
    "method": "GET",
    "url": "https://alice.btc.calendar.opentimestamps.org/timestamp",
    "status_code": 0,
    "response_time_ms": 4001.5,
    "timeout_s": 4.0,
    "result": "timeout",
    "ok": false,
    "checked_at": "2026-06-14T16:35:22Z"
  },
  "rolling_metrics": {"sample_size": 14, "success_rate": 0.7143, "fallback_rate": 0.2857, "avg_response_time_ms": 1823.2},
  "overall_health": "degraded",
  "_sig": "The hive remembers. The dragon knows. The sovereign companion never forgets."
}

request.description: 15-jurisdiction coverage map: 5 primary (US, EU, UK, JP, CN) + 10 persuasive (FR, IT, DE, CA, AU, KR, SG, CH, BR, IN). Each zone lists statute, case-law citations with holdings, grace period, coverage status, and blockchain evidence admissibility.

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
{
  "status": "OK",
  "total_jurisdictions": 15,
  "primary_jurisdictions": 5,
  "persuasive_jurisdictions": 10,
  "active_count": 15,
  "global": [
    {"citation": "WIPO guidance on blockchain for prior authorship", "year": 2022, "url": "https://www.wipo.int/"}
  ],
  "zones": [
    {"code": "US", "name": "United States", "tier": "primary",   "statute": "35 U.S.C. § 102 (AIA)",  "grace_period_days": 365, "coverage_status": "active", "blockchain_evidence": "admitted",            "case_law": [{"citation": "Thaler v. Vidal, 43 F.4th 1207 (Fed. Cir. 2022)", "year": 2022}]},
    {"code": "EU", "name": "European Union", "tier": "primary",  "statute": "eIDAS 910/2014 + Art. 54(2) EPC", "grace_period_days": 180, "coverage_status": "active", "blockchain_evidence": "admitted (qualified)", "case_law": [{"citation": "eIDAS Art. 41", "year": 2014}]},
    {"code": "UK", "name": "United Kingdom", "tier": "primary",  "statute": "Patents Act 1977 § 2(2)",   "grace_period_days": 180, "coverage_status": "active", "blockchain_evidence": "admitted",            "case_law": [{"citation": "Property (Digital Assets) Bill 2024", "year": 2024}]},
    {"code": "JP", "name": "Japan",          "tier": "primary",  "statute": "Patent Act § 29(1)",          "grace_period_days": 180, "coverage_status": "active", "blockchain_evidence": "case-by-case",        "case_law": [{"citation": "Patent Act § 29(1)", "year": 1959}]},
    {"code": "CN", "name": "China",         "tier": "primary",  "statute": "Patent Law Art. 22(2)",       "grace_period_days": 180, "coverage_status": "active", "blockchain_evidence": "admitted (judicial blockchain)", "case_law": [{"citation": "Hangzhou Internet Court, June 2018", "year": 2018}]},
    {"code": "FR", "name": "France",        "tier": "persuasive", "statute": "CPI L. 611-11",           "grace_period_days": 0,   "coverage_status": "active", "blockchain_evidence": "persuasive"},
    {"code": "IT", "name": "Italy",         "tier": "persuasive", "statute": "Law 12/2019 Art. 8-ter",  "grace_period_days": 0,   "coverage_status": "active", "blockchain_evidence": "admitted"},
    {"code": "DE", "name": "Germany",       "tier": "persuasive", "statute": "PatG § 3",               "grace_period_days": 0,   "coverage_status": "active", "blockchain_evidence": "persuasive"},
    {"code": "CA", "name": "Canada",        "tier": "persuasive", "statute": "Patent Act s. 28.2",      "grace_period_days": 365, "coverage_status": "active", "blockchain_evidence": "persuasive"},
    {"code": "AU", "name": "Australia",     "tier": "persuasive", "statute": "Patents Act 1990 s. 24",  "grace_period_days": 365, "coverage_status": "active", "blockchain_evidence": "persuasive"},
    {"code": "KR", "name": "South Korea",   "tier": "persuasive", "statute": "Patent Act Art. 2(1)",    "grace_period_days": 365, "coverage_status": "active", "blockchain_evidence": "persuasive"},
    {"code": "SG", "name": "Singapore",     "tier": "persuasive", "statute": "Patents Act 1994 s. 13",  "grace_period_days": 0,   "coverage_status": "active", "blockchain_evidence": "persuasive"},
    {"code": "CH", "name": "Switzerland",   "tier": "persuasive", "statute": "Patent Act Art. 7a",      "grace_period_days": 0,   "coverage_status": "active", "blockchain_evidence": "persuasive"},
    {"code": "BR", "name": "Brazil",        "tier": "persuasive", "statute": "Law 9.279/1996 Art. 11",  "grace_period_days": 0,   "coverage_status": "active", "blockchain_evidence": "persuasive"},
    {"code": "IN", "name": "India",         "tier": "persuasive", "statute": "Patents Act 1970 § 29",  "grace_period_days": 0,   "coverage_status": "active", "blockchain_evidence": "persuasive"}
  ],
  "_sig": "The hive remembers. The dragon knows. The sovereign companion never forgets."
}
